mapper.sql: id, template_id, employee_id, dept_id, self_total_score, supervisor_total_score, final_total_score, appraisal_grade, grade_comment, overall_comment, result_status, confirm_status, confirm_time, publish_start_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appraisal_result (template_id, employee_id, dept_id, self_total_score, supervisor_total_score, final_total_score, appraisal_grade, grade_comment, overall_comment, result_status, confirm_status, publish_start_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{employeeId}, #{deptId}, #{selfTotalScore}, #{supervisorTotalScore}, #{finalTotalScore}, #{appraisalGrade}, #{gradeComment}, #{overallComment}, #{resultStatus}, #{confirmStatus}, #{publishStartTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.employee_id, e.emp_no, e.emp_name, r.dept_id, d.dept_name, r.self_total_score, r.supervisor_total_score, r.final_total_score, r.appraisal_grade, r.overall_comment, r.result_status, r.confirm_status FROM appraisal_result r LEFT JOIN emp_employee e ON r.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON r.dept_id = d.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
